Thanks for contributing!

Before submitting, please check:
- [ ] Read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `CLAUDE.md` for project conventions.
- [ ] One change per PR. Don't bundle unrelated refactors with feature work.
- [ ] Tests added / updated. Bug fixes need a regression test.
- [ ] `make lint test` (backend) and `npx tsc --noEmit` (frontend) pass locally.
- [ ] Proto changes pass `make proto-breaking`.
-->
